name: Snails Menetrel / Escargots a La Menetrel
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time 25 minutes. Cooking time 8 minutes.
1. Make snail butter by working the butter with a mixture of chopped parsley, garlic, shallots, and anchovy fillets. Season with salt, pepper, and Quatre-epices, then work through a fine sieve.
2. Place a piece of butter the size of a bean inside each snail shell.
3. Add a snail to each shell, then close the shells with additional butter, pressing it down firmly.
4. Arrange the prepared snails on a dish and moisten with white wine if desired.
5. Sprinkle breadcrumbs over the snails and bake in a hot oven for 8 minutes.
6. Use dry white wines such as Macon-Vire, Bourgogne-Aligote, Rully, or Pouilly-Fuisse.
